assertions.rationale: Disabling automatic key management is fairly intuitive and known from IdentityServer4.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs loads a certificate from '/certs/signing.pfx' using X509CertificateLoader.LoadPkcs12 or X509Certificate2
assertions.rationale: Loading PFX certificates is standard .NET knowledge, though may use new X509Certificate2 instead of Loader.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddSigningCredential with the loaded certificate and RS256 algorithm (SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256 or 'RS256')
assertions.rationale: AddSigningCredential is known from IdentityServer4 era.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs does not remove the existing client and scope configuration
assertions.rationale: A general LLM might restructure the entire file or accidentally omit existing configuration.
